name: PHY386 Python Environment
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends libgeos-dev libproj-dev proj-data proj-bin libgdal-dev && sudo rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
postCreateCommand: pip install -r requirements/requirements_HW2026.txt && python -m ipykernel install --user --name python3 --display-name 'Python 3'
